summary: Colorado Division of Water Resources well application permit records. Columns include permit ID key, address, UTM coordinates, static water level and date, first beneficial use date, permit issued date, current status, and associated case numbers.
Colorado FirstNet governing body representative addresses and contact information. Columns include organization name, representative, contact information, location, county, legend, and size of dot.

Colorado PACFA (Pet Animal Care Facilities Act) active facility license list as of August 2018. Columns include business name, DBAs, city, ZIP code, state code, operation types, expiration date, last inspection date, last inspection purpose, and last inspection outcome.
Denver food store locations supporting the Food Retail Expansion to Support Health (FRESH) program. Columns include store name, store type, full address, city, ZIP code, and point coordinates.
Colorado governmental agencies listing by entity type. Columns include entity name, type of entity, address, city, state, ZIP code, and county.
Denver Public Schools location GIS dataset. Columns include school name, school level, address ID, city, state, ZIP code, notes, global ID, object ID, county, and point coordinates.

Colorado professional lobbyist clients listing from the Secretary of State. Columns include lobbyist firm name, primary lobbyist ID, client name, client address, city, state, ZIP code, phone, industry/trade type, and business type.
Colorado West Nile Virus cases by age group and gender for 2012. Columns include age group, male case count, female case count, and total cases.
Colorado open data portal featured stories listing. Columns include order, title, link, description, and image.
Colorado 2014 general election precinct-level results. Columns include county, precinct, election type, year, office/issue/judgeship, candidate, party, candidate votes, yes votes, and no votes.
Contaminated lands and EPA-categorized brownfields in Colorado. Columns include site name, program type, city, state, mapped acreage, county, and geometry.
Federally owned land boundaries in Colorado GIS dataset. Columns include feature type, name, state, square miles, and geometry.
Colorado non-powered dams with hydropower potential greater than 1MW. Columns include dam name, water body, HUC02 code, and megawatt-hour estimates for multiple scenarios.
Denver statistical neighborhood boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include neighborhood ID, neighborhood name, notes, typology, and geometry.

Colorado census tracts with 2015-2019 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include demographic and housing variables including citizenship status, migration, race/ethnicity, and rent cost burden metrics.
Colorado myColorado mobile app active users by enrollment month. Columns include year, month, period, and number of CINs (Colorado Identification Numbers).

Vacant industrial and commercial parcels in Grand Junction, Colorado. Columns include owner name, owner address, owner state and ZIP, property type, zoning, assessed value, actual value, acreage, URL, and geometry.
Colorado census tracts with 2014-2018 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include housing age, rent cost, citizenship status, migration, and nativity variables.

Colorado pending renewals for liquor licenses from the Division of Liquor Enforcement. Columns include licensee name, DBA, license number, license type, pending status, assignment type, assignment status, and date assigned.
Garfield County, Colorado boundary GIS dataset. Columns include county name, FIPS codes, square miles, acres, and geometry.
Colorado census block groups with 2014-2018 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include housing age variables, education attainment levels, and housing unit characteristics.

Colorado census places with 2017 American Community Survey data. Columns include GEOID, population by age, housing occupancy, nativity, citizenship, vehicle and carpool usage, and housing value variables.
Colorado census counties with 2018 American Community Survey data. Columns include school enrollment counts, educational attainment levels, population by age group, and degree type counts.
Colorado census tracts with 2013-2017 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include housing value ranges, housing age decade variables, and housing unit counts.
Colorado census counties with 2019 American Community Survey data. Columns include rent cost ranges, housing value ranges, housing age variables, and unit count by bedroom size.

Colorado census block groups with 2015-2019 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include kindergarten enrollment, school-age population, poverty rate, workers age 16+, commute mode, and migration variables.
Colorado census counties with 2017 American Community Survey data. Columns include education attainment levels, housing value ranges, housing age variables, and median home value.

Colorado census places with 2018 American Community Survey data. Columns include population 25+, rent cost ranges, rental occupancy, median contract rent, poverty rate, per capita income, and median family income.
Public buildings within Garfield County, Colorado GIS dataset. Columns include building name, short name, type, address, city, phone, comment, and geometry.
Colorado census places with 2019 American Community Survey data. Columns include population 25+, educational attainment, bedroom count by unit type, and rent cost ranges.

Colorado census block groups with 2013-2017 five-year American Community Survey data. Columns include age and sex breakdown, race/ethnicity, citizenship status, migration origin, and rent cost variables.
Colorado scenic byways GIS dataset. Columns include byway name, scenic ID, object ID, label, description, route, reference point, and end reference point.
Colorado county boundaries and all-hazards regions GIS dataset from 2001. Columns include county name, description, and geometry.
